title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCVII. Lullabies.
content:
Give me a blow, and I'll beat 'em,
            Why did they vex my baby?
        Kissy, kiss, kissy, my honey,
            And cuddle your nurse, my deary.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCXCVII. Lullabies." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
